PurchaseReservedVolume.billing: Custom renewal duration in months. If empty, aligns with the expiration time of the attached BCC instance. The custom duration must be greater than (BCC expiration time - CDS current expiration time), otherwise renewal fails. Supported range: [1, 60] months.
PurchaseReservedVolume.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding (spot instance). Applicable for creating instances, creating spot instances, and renewing instances.
PurchaseReservedVolume.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid. Applicable for creating instances, creating spot instances, and renewing instances.
PurchaseReservedVolume.instanceId: ID of the prepaid BCC instance to which the unattached disk is expected to be mounted. Required when the disk is unattached; optional when already attached (can be omitted or set to the current instance ID).
